hero.badge: Grounded AI tutor · uz / en / ru
hero.titleLead: Turn anything into a lesson you actually
hero.subtitle: Drop in a PDF, slide deck or YouTube link. Talim gives you a clean summary, a podcast, quizzes, and an AI tutor that answers from your material — not the whole internet.
hero.trust: Trusted by learners & tutors across Uzbekistan

how.title: Three steps, from source to mastery

0.title: Add a source
0.desc: Upload a PDF or slides, or paste a YouTube link. Talim extracts and indexes every page.

1.title: Let AI shape it
1.desc: Summaries, a narrated podcast, quizzes and visual explainers are generated automatically.

2.title: Learn & ask
2.desc: Read, listen, test yourself, and ask the tutor anything — grounded in your own content.

features.title: Every way to understand a topic

0.title: Sectioned summaries
0.desc: Key points and reading-time estimates, section by section.

1.title: Podcasts
1.desc: Listen to any material as a narrated episode in your language.

2.title: Quizzes
2.desc: Auto-generated questions with explanations and attempt tracking.

3.title: AI tutor chat
3.desc: RAG-grounded answers with charts, diagrams and animations.

4.title: Progress
4.desc: See mastery climb across every topic and assessment.

5.title: Game quizzes
5.desc: Timed, points-based class battles with a live leaderboard.

tutors.title: Teach a roster, not a spreadsheet.
tutors.subtitle: Manage students, assign materials, build AI question banks, and run game assessments with a class leaderboard — no AI plumbing to set up.

pricing.title: Start free, scale when you teach

1.name: Tutor
1.desc: Activated by our team to fit your roster.

pricing.subtitle: Free for individual learners. Tutor and school plans are activated by our team to fit your class.
pricing.note: No credit card. We activate paid plans manually — just request access.

0.quote: I drop a lecture PDF in and walk away with a podcast for the bus and a quiz for the night. My grades moved.
0.name: Madina S.

1.quote: I run three classes from one screen — assign material, build a game quiz, watch the leaderboard light up. No setup.
1.name: Aziz Karimov

2.quote: The tutor explains in O'zbek and points me to the exact page. It finally feels like it's mine.
2.name: Sevara R.

0.q: Is it really free to learn?
0.a: Yes. Individual learners get summaries, quizzes and the AI tutor for free; Pro & Max unlock unlimited materials, podcasts and the advanced tutor.

1.a: PDFs and slides, or paste a YouTube link. Talim extracts, indexes and turns it into a lesson — grounded answers cite the exact page or timestamp.

2.q: How do I become a tutor?
2.a: Request access from your account. Our team activates a Team or School plan with a seat limit that fits your roster — then student management unlocks.

3.a: Uzbek, English and Russian across the whole product — interface, summaries, podcasts and the tutor.

cta.subtitle: Free to start — no card needed.

pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready — no card required, plans are activated by our team.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of Talim AI. By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to the terms below.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: By registering for or using Talim AI, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform. If you use Talim AI on behalf of an organization, you represent that you are authorized to accept these terms for that organization.

accounts.title: Accounts and eligibility
accounts.body: You must provide accurate information when creating an account and keep your login credentials secure. You are responsible for all activity under your account. Students may be added to a class by a tutor and can join using a class code. You must be old enough to use the platform under the laws of your country, or use it under the supervision of a parent, guardian, or tutor.

use.title: Acceptable use
use.body: You agree to use Talim AI only for lawful, educational purposes. You may not upload unlawful, harmful, or infringing material, attempt to disrupt or reverse-engineer the service, abuse the AI features to generate prohibited content, or access data that does not belong to you. We may suspend or remove access to accounts that violate these rules.

content.title: Content and ownership
content.body: You retain ownership of the materials you upload. By uploading content, you grant Talim AI a limited license to process it in order to generate summaries, podcasts, quizzes, and tutor responses for you and your class. AI-generated output is provided to support your learning and may contain errors; you are responsible for reviewing it before relying on it. You must have the right to upload any material you share with the platform.

orgs.title: Tutors and student organizations
orgs.body: Tutors and schools operate as organizations with a set number of seats. A tutor administers their organization, creates and manages student accounts, assigns materials, and runs assessments. Organizations are activated manually by a Talim AI administrator, who sets the seat limit; there is no automated payment. Tutors are responsible for the students they add and for using student data only for legitimate educational purposes. Deactivating a student immediately removes their access to assigned content.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers and liability
disclaimers.body: Talim AI is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that AI-generated summaries, answers, or assessments are complete or accurate, and they are not a substitute for professional or certified instruction. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Talim AI is not liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time as the platform evolves. When we make material changes, we will update the date at the top of this page. Your continued use of Talim AI after changes take effect means you accept the revised terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about these terms, contact us at support@talim.ai.
